title: DevOps Engineer (12 Month Contract)
description:
We are partnered with an established financial institution to look for a DevOps Engineer to support platform modernisation and cloud-native adoption across global engineering teams.

This is a 12-month contract role, based in Singapore, under an external agency payroll.

You will work closely with engineering, platform, and operations teams to drive standardisation, automation, and the onboarding of applications onto common cloud and observability platforms.

Responsibilities

• Drive standardisation and automation across engineering platforms

• Support onboarding of applications to a cloud-native stack

• Enable teams to adopt shared platforms, including observability frameworks

• Maintain and support common DevOps and platform tooling

• Promote strong engineering practices and an automation-first mindset

• Support the operation of critical, business-critical systems at scale

Requirements

• Minimum 5 years of relevant professional experience

• Strong hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines and automation

• Solid Linux and scripting background

• Proven experience deploying and operating Kubernetes-based platforms

• Experience with Azure cloud services

• Prior development experience in at least one mainstream language

• Strong understanding of microservices and distributed architectures

• Experience defining non-functional requirements and documenting designs

• Familiarity with observability and monitoring best practices

postedCompany.description:
Eames Consulting Group connects the financial and professional services sectors with the talent needed to succeed. With over 130 staff and offices in London, Zurich, Singapore and Hong Kong, our services include retained and contingent search, contract and interim solutions.

Occupying the mid-to-senior levels of the market, we work in close partnership with our clients to offer a variety of services directly suited to their specific business needs, including sourcing niche skills, finding talent in challenging geographies, handling senior or confidential assignments and detailed research and market mapping projects.

Working exclusively across the insurance, banking and consultancy & advisory sectors, we operate under core technical disciplines. 

• Committed to vision: the growth and development of relationships, our careers and our people – The Red Thread

• #1: Recruitment International listed Eames as the #1 Insurance recruitment and search firm in the UK and #14 for Banking & Finance - our two core markets 

• YOY: consistent growth year on year – 30% uplift on NFI last year

• Team Eames: 38% of team have been promoted in last 12 months

• L&D: over 240 hours of bespoke training undertaken last year

• Turning up the heat: for the fifth consecutive year, we were listed in the Recruiter HOT 100- a list of the UK’s fastest growing recruitment companies

• Officially one of the best: for the 3rd consecutive year we received a 2-star Best Companies Accreditation

Specialties: I am responsible for the growth and development of Eames Consulting Singapore through the management of both client relationships and specialist teams covering;

• Actuarial
• Audit
• Broking, Claims & Underwriting
• Change Management
• Compliance
• Risk Management
• Technology
postedCompany.name: EAMES CONSULTING GROUP (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
